text:
戻ったな。
随分と上達したようだ。

特訓を重ねてこそ、意味がある。
それが証明されて何よりだ。

自主的に努力を重ねることはもちろん
更なる高みを目指すなら
特訓を課そう。

今よりハードな特訓メニューを
用意

You're back... color me impressed. You've
improved significantly.

There's value in special training--that much is
crystal clear.

Taking the initiative and working hard is
ideal, too... but if you want to truly excel,
then special training is the way to go.

I'll plan out an even harder course for you
next time.
